welcome.title: Welcome to VSEDI
welcome.subtitle: This wizard will guide you through the configuration of AIRACs, plugins and other specific settings for VATSIM Spain controllers.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: Changes in VSEDI and the Operations sectors for this AIRAC.

euroscope.title: EuroScope
euroscope.subtitle: EuroScope is the VATSIM radar client needed to connect to the network as a controller.
euroscope.ask_question: Do you already have EuroScope installed?
euroscope.install_prompt: The EuroScope installer has opened. Complete the installation and close it to continue.

config.title: Configuration data
config.subtitle: Enter your VATSIM credentials and preferences.
config.name: Network name
config.overwrite_desc: Your current configuration will be erased and the installed sectors will use default settings
config.backup_desc: A .zip copy of your EuroScope folder (VSEDI_Backup) will be made and old .prf, .sct, .ese and .rwy files from LECB, LECM, GCCC and LEXX will be removed before installing

extras.title: Extras
extras.subtitle: Select the additional tools you want to install alongside the sectors. You can skip this step if you don't need any.

progress.subtitle_ready: EuroScope has been configured correctly. You can now start controlling.
progress.subtitle_error: An error occurred. Check the data and try again.
progress.subtitle_progress: Please wait while we configure the system.
progress.task_backup: Backing up and cleaning old sectors
progress.extra_installer_open: The installer has opened. Configure it and close it to continue.
progress.extra_install_failed: Could not install. You can do it manually later.

final.title: All done!
final.subtitle: EuroScope has been configured correctly. You can now close this wizard and start controlling on VATSIM Spain.

update.downloaded: Update ready{{version}}, restart to apply it

opensource.text_mid: . If you find an issue, open a GitHub issue or contact

footer.made_with: Made with ❤️ by the Web dept.

extras_config.vspv_desc: This font will be used by the SACTA plugin to resemble real radars as closely as possible.
extras_config.trackaudio_desc: Modern audio client for VATSIM. Replaces Audio for VATSIM with better audio quality and lower latency.
extras_config.vatis_desc: Tool for generating and broadcasting digital ATIS information on the VATSIM network.
